title: RNA extraction from Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 with Trizol reagent
author: Dennis DD Dienst
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j3scqne

steps.title: Label all required tubes and store...
steps.instruction: Label all required tubes and store on ice (or freezer, if not needed immediately)

steps.title: Fill sterile 50 mL tube (Falcon)...
steps.instruction: Fill sterile 50 mL tube (Falcon) w/ ice and store in ice bath

steps.title: Pour 20-25 mL cell culture (OD750 < 1
steps.instruction: Pour 20-25 mL cell culture (OD750 < 1.0) to ice-filled tube (up to ~45 mL mark)Note: avoid long transport of cell culture before harvest

steps.title: spin down at 4000 - 5000...
steps.instruction: spin down at 4000 - 5000 g and 4 ° C for 5 min

steps.title: discard supernatant (w/ ice) into big beakerNote
steps.instruction: discard supernatant (w/ ice) into big beakerNote: depending on strain/mutant some cells will get lost at this step

steps.title: resuspend cell pellet in residual water (~ 1 mL)
steps.instruction: resuspend cell pellet in residual water (~ 1 mL)

steps.title: transfer suspension into 2 mL (safe lock
steps.instruction: transfer suspension into 2 mL (safe lock!) tubes (work on ice!)

steps.title: spin down at ~13
steps.instruction: spin down at ~13.000 g and 4° C for 15 sec

steps.title: discard supernatant w/ pipetNote
steps.instruction: discard supernatant w/ pipetNote: try to remove supernatant 'as quantitatively as possible'

steps.title: resuspend pellet in 1 mL Trizol reagent
steps.instruction: resuspend pellet in 1 mL Trizol reagent

steps.title: store at -20 °C or (better) -80 °C
steps.instruction: store at -20 °C or (better) -80 °C

steps.title: incubate frozen samples at 65° C...
steps.instruction: incubate frozen samples at 65° C for 15 min under constant agitationNote: if no shaking thermoblock is available, vortex once per minute

steps.title: add 200 µL (ice cold) chloroform-isoamylalcohol...
steps.instruction: add 200 µL (ice cold) chloroform-isoamylalcohol (24:1) per 1 mL Trizol and vortex for 30 sec

steps.title: spin down at ~11
steps.instruction: spin down at ~11.000 g and 4° C for 10 min

steps.title: transfer upper, aqueous phase to fresh 1
steps.instruction: transfer upper, aqueous phase to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: add 1 Vol
steps.instruction: add 1 Vol. (ice cold) phenol-chloroform-isoamylalcohol (25:24:1)Note: for RNA preparation phenol solution/mixtures should not be Tris-buffered

steps.title: transfer upper, aqueous phase to fresh 1
steps.instruction: transfer upper, aqueous phase to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: add 1 Vol
steps.instruction: add 1 Vol. isopropanol (2-propanol), 10 µL 3 M Na-Acetat (pH 5.2) and 1 µL glycogen (RNA grade, Thermo)

steps.title: incubate o/n at -20 for precipitation
steps.instruction: incubate o/n at -20 for precipitation

steps.title: spin down at ~13
steps.instruction: spin down at ~13.000 g and 4° C for 30 min

steps.title: remove supernatant and wash pellet w/ 70% EtOH (ice cold)
steps.instruction: remove supernatant and wash pellet w/ 70% EtOH (ice cold)

steps.title: spin down at ~13
steps.instruction: spin down at ~13.000 g and 4° C for 10 min

steps.title: repeat steps 24 and 25
steps.instruction: repeat steps 24 and 25

steps.title: discard supernatant and air-dry RNA pellet for ~10 min
steps.instruction: discard supernatant and air-dry RNA pellet for ~10 min

steps.title: resuspend RNA Pellet in ~30 µL...
steps.instruction: resuspend RNA Pellet in ~30 µL ultra-pure water and store at -20 or (better) -80°C
